HeaderSection.title: Internxt vs Google Cloud overview
HeaderSection.description: Discover the key features and differences that allow Internxt to give you back control over your data

internxtFeatures: Object storage, backups, S3 compatible, instant data access
competitorFeatures: Object storage, Infrequent Access, Glacier, Deep Archive
Can access files under certain circumstances.
Less privacy: EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework

PrivacyViolationsSection.title: Google Cloud involves complex security controls, high costs, and employees can access your data.
PrivacyViolationsSection.description: Internxt object storage includes default advanced security, keeps your files private, and offers predictable, affordable plans.

descriptions: Securing Google Cloud requires managing multiple layers of settings, including firewalls, encryption keys, and permissions. Improperly set permissions, mismanaged keys, or overlooked network policies can leave data exposed. Users must constantly monitor and adjust settings to maintain security.

Using Google Cloud at high volumes can become expensive quickly. Pricing for storage, network transfer, and extra services accumulates over time. Scaling without careful planning can lead to unexpected expenses, making long-term financial planning difficult.

Google Cloud employees and contractors may access user data for maintenance or compliance. Even though access is controlled, there is always a risk of unintended exposure. Sensitive files are technically accessible to others, which may concern privacy-conscious individuals or organizations.

Integration with other Google services means information about user behavior, storage habits, and app usage can be collected and combined. Users concerned with privacy may find it difficult to limit tracking or prevent their data from being used in multiple contexts.

WhyNeedAlternativeSection.title: Why you need an alternative to Google Cloud
WhyNeedAlternativeSection.description: What Google Cloud demonstrates in security fails in terms of privacy. For full privacy, get total security combined with zero-knowledge encryption from Internxt.

descriptions: Setting up storage on Google Cloud involves navigating multiple dashboards and security systems. Users must manually manage roles, access rules, and regions. Simple tasks often require technical knowledge, making the platform difficult for beginners and slowing down development.

Google Cloud charges separately for storage, requests, data transfer, monitoring, backups, and security features. These small fees accumulate quickly and are difficult to track. Any increases in traffic or usage can cause major bill spikes, making long-term budgeting unreliable for businesses.

Google Cloud charges high fees for transferring data out of its platform. Every file download, backup, restore, or migration adds to the bill. This pricing model effectively locks data inside the platform and penalizes high-usage workloads.

VersusSection.title: Internxt vs Google Cloud
VersusSection.description: Internxt offers unrivaled privacy and security thanks to zero-knowledge, post-quantum encryption, giving you the best protection from cyberattacks.

features.title: Usage based
features.description: Costs depend and increase based on multiple factors, which can soon become expensive and unmanageable.

WhyBestAlternativeSection.title: Why Internxt is the best alternative to Google Cloud
WhyBestAlternativeSection.description: Internxt Drive offers a comprehensive suite of products designed to give you back control of your online privacy.

descriptions: Internxt S3 provides built-in end-to-end encryption and immutable object locking to protect data from loss, corruption, or ransomware. With 11×9s durability, all files are kept secure and safe across multiple regions.

Internxt S3 is a 100% hot cloud storage solution, so all files are immediately available for upload or download. There is no cold storage or delayed retrieval, unlike Microsoft S3 Glacier, where accessing data can take hours. This instant availability ensures fast response times for all workloads.

Internxt S3 uses flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees. Users know exactly what they will pay each month without worrying about request charges, downloads, or replication costs. This is simpler and more predictable than Microsoft S3, where billing can be confusing and variable.

Users pay a simple cost per gigabyte with Internxt S3, and pricing does not change based on access frequency or transfer. This predictable model reduces total expenses, unlike Microsoft S3, where storage, retrieval, and egress fees all affect the per-gigabyte cost.

CtaSection.title: Choose Internxt for the best Google Cloud alternative
CtaSection.description: Internxt S3 gives you affordable object storage with full private encryption, open source software, and no additional data transfer fees.

freePlanCard.description: Pay only for the storage you use. No additional fees.

faq.question: What is object storage?
answer: Object storage is a way to store data as discrete units called objects, each with its own metadata and unique identifier. Internet S3 object storage offers rapid access to large data sets, making it an affordable and scalable cloud storage solution.

faq.question: What is the best alternative to Google Cloud?
answer: Internxt is the best Google Cloud alternative if you need object storage with predictable and scalable pricing, and fast and efficient access to large amounts of data.

faq.question: Where is Internxt based?
answer: Internxt is based in Valencia, Spain, making it a GDPR compliant cloud object storage solution that follows strict laws to ensure your data and privacy are protected.

faq.question: Is Google Cloud more expensive than Internxt?
answer: As Internxt offers pay-as-you-go storage, there are no additional fees for moving data in or out of the cloud, making Internxt S3 up to 80% cheaper than Amazon, Azure, or Google Cloud.

faq.question: How do I contact support?
answer: If you have any more questions, requests, or need assistance, you can contact hello@internxt.com and our Customer Success Team will be happy to help.
